content.full_text:
SOUTH ORANGE COUNTY LEADERSHIP CONFERENCE
POST OFFICE BOX 3178 · MISSION VIEJO · CA 92690 · (714) 458-0419

May 29, 1990


Mr. Johnathan Rothman
Fair Political Practices Commission
Legal Division
P. O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Dear Mr. Rothman:

On the morning of May 16th, I contacted you to ask your assistance
in determining whether our 501.3(c) non-profit association, the
South Orange County Leadership Conference, would be considered as
a public agency, and therefore, subject to restrictions under
Proposition 73, particularly as it relates to mass mailings. After
research into the question, you phoned me back later in the day
with the conclusions that we were not bound by the provisions of
Proposition 73, as we did not meet all the criteria for public
agencies established by the proposition.

Thank you for the effort you put forth on our behalf, while doing
research on this topic. I would appreciate the reiteration of your
conclusions in writing, so we may have a copy of your decision on
record in our files.

Thank you again for your assistance. Please mail your reply to:
Carolyn Wallace, South Orange County Leadership Conference, P. O.
Box 3178, Mission Viejo, California 92690. If you should need to
contact me, I may be reached at (714) 458-0419.

Cordially,

Carolyn K. Wallace
Executive Coordinator

CKW:lcg
